'''Access''' tab in '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Options]]''':

[[Image:options_access.jpg|center|800px|SuperMemo: Toolkit : Options : Access tab]]

* '''<span id="Secondary storage">Secondary storage</span>''' - path to the [[Glossary:Secondary_storage|secondary storage]] (e.g. a DVD drive) where large multimedia files are stored. If this path is left empty then the secondary storage path will be equal to the primary storage path, i.e. the path where the [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] is located. You can move files of a given [[Glossary:Registry|registry]] from a DVD to your hard disk with '''[[Registry menu#Tools|Tools]] : Internalize files''' on the [[registry menu]]. If you then delete the secondary storage path, you will be able to use the [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] without a DVD drive.
* '''Access level''' - determines the difficulty [[Glossary:Level|level]] of SuperMemo (same as in '''[[File menu|File]] : [[Levels|Level]]'''):
** '''Beginner''' - provides only the most fundamental options: '''[[Learn]]''', '''[[Add new]]''', '''[[Contents]]''', [[Find elements|'''Search''']], etc.
** '''Basic''' - adds the possibility of creating and editing [[Glossary:Component|components]], editing titles, etc.
** '''Middle''' - add many options of advanced user without rarely used options available only on the '''Professional''' [[Glossary:Level|level]]
** '''Professional''' - provides access to all options implemented in SuperMemo
* '''Default element''' - default [[Glossary:Element|element]] that is displayed when ''Esc'' is pressed or when the [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] is first opened. To clear the default [[Glossary:Element|element]], press ''Esc'' in the [[Contents|'''Contents''' window]] while selecting the default element
* '''Password''' - password that is asked at the moment of opening a [[Glossary:Collection|collection]]. '''Caution:''' SuperMemo does not use any sophisticated encryption; this password is easy to crack. Please do not store confidential data in your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] as this could easily be inspected with any file editor. Nevertheless, the password can be useful to prevent your kids from messing with your learning material or your colleague making accidental repetitions with your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]]
* '''Compile lexicon on-the-fly''' - request for a lexicon of words used in your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] to be compiled as you add new material. Leave this unchecked unless your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] is very small. This way your lexicon will only be rebuilt when you run '''[[File menu|File]] : [[Repairing collections|Repair collection]]''' and check '''Rebuild lexicon'''. The lexicon is the list of all words used in the [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] and is available with '''[[Search menu|Search]] : [[Search menu#Lexicon|Lexicon]]''' on the [[main menu]]. Remember that if you uncheck this option, your lexicon may include words that no longer exist in your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] and may not list words from newly added texts
